common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to update the address of a shop.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Cannot set inbound pickup address for this address.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Inbound pickup address invalid state & city, state&city must be the same as kyc.billing_address state&city or fbs_branch.billing_address state&city.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Inbound pickup address cannot be the same as Shopee warehouse address.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: BR pickup address SRN is invalid

solution.content:
The matched SRN exists but its status is invalid.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: BR pickup address SRN record not found

solution.content: The selected pickup address state does not have a valid SRN record.

children.data: The selected pickup address state does not have a valid SRN record.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: BR pickup address state does not match SRN

solution.content: The pickup address state does not match the seller KYC / SRN information.

request_params.description: Unique identifier for the address. You can get the address_id via v2.logistics.get_address_list.
request_params.name: address_id

request_params.description:
The region of the address.


Note: Do not allow to update the region of the address.
request_params.name: region

request_params.description: The detailed address description of the address.
request_params.name: address

request_params.description:
Geolocation information for the address. 


Type: JSON string


Note: 

1) To clear existing geo info, pass "" or {}.

2) To keep existing geo info, do not include this field.

3) The JSON may include optional fields:

- formattedAddress (string): full formatted address.

- region (object) – contains latitude and longitude as floats.

- user_verified (boolean) – whether the geolocation is verified by the user.
- user_adjusted (boolean) – whether the geolocation was adjusted by the user.
request_params.name: geo_info

response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message
response_params.sample: The param is invalid. not allow to edit address region.

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
response_params.name: request_id

request_sample.value:
Unirest.setTimeouts(0, 0);
HttpResponse<String> response = Unirest.post("https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/update_address?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp")
.header("Content-Type","application/json")
.body("{
   \"address\": \"123 Rua dos Pinheiros Apt 45\",
   \"address_id\": 123456,
   \"city\": \"São Paulo\",
   \"district\": \"Pinheiros\",
   \"geo_info\": \"-\",
   \"name\": \"Carlos Silva\",
   \"phone\": \"+55-11-91234-5678\",
   \"region\": \"Brazil\",
   \"state\": \"SP\",
   \"town\": \"Rua dos Pinheiros\",
   \"zipcode\": \"05422-001\"
}")
.asString();

<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/update_address?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "address": "123 Rua dos Pinheiros Apt 45",
    "address_id": 123456,
    "city": "São Paulo",
    "district": "Pinheiros",
    "geo_info": "-",
    "name": "Carlos Silva",
    "phone": "+55-11-91234-5678",
    "region": "Brazil",
    "state": "SP",
    "town": "Rua dos Pinheiros",
    "zipcode": "05422-001"
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

curl --location --request POST 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/update_address?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-raw '{
   "address": "123 Rua dos Pinheiros Apt 45",
   "address_id": 123456,
   "city": "São Paulo",
   "district": "Pinheiros",
   "geo_info": "-",
   "name": "Carlos Silva",
   "phone": "+55-11-91234-5678",
   "region": "Brazil",
   "state": "SP",
   "town": "Rua dos Pinheiros",
   "zipcode": "05422-001"
}'

import requests
import json

url = "https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/update_address?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp"

payload=json.dumps({
  "address": "123 Rua dos Pinheiros Apt 45",
  "address_id": 123456,
  "city": "São Paulo",
  "district": "Pinheiros",
  "geo_info": "-",
  "name": "Carlos Silva",
  "phone": "+55-11-91234-5678",
  "region": "Brazil",
  "state": "SP",
  "town": "Rua dos Pinheiros",
  "zipcode": "05422-001"
})
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
response = requests.RPCRequest("POST",url,headers=headers, data=payload, allow_redirects=False)

print(response.text)

value.message: The param is invalid. not allow to edit address region.
